'''''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith''''' is a trade paperback collecting all six issues in the ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith]]'' comic series.

{{Comics-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''In the depths of galactic space, a foolish and arrogant young Jedi awakens an ancient, deadly power. This seductive evil leads him down a path that will make him a Dark Lord of the Sith.''

==Media==
